tool.name: Stanza Language Models
tool.description: Download and install Stanza language models

param.name: package
param.label: Model package
param.help: Which Stanza model variant to install. default_fast is the small, CPU-friendly set (tokenization, POS, lemma, depparse, NER, sentiment where available). default and default_accurate are larger and additionally include constituency parsing.

tool.help:
Stanza Language Models Data Manager ====================================
This data manager downloads and installs Stanza language models for use with the Stanza NLP annotation tool.
How It Works ------------
Stanza models are downloaded using the ``stanza.download()`` API and stored in a Galaxy-managed stanza_resources directory. Select a model package to install:
- ``default_fast`` (recommended): memory-efficient nocharlm models for tokenization, POS, lemma, depparse, NER, and sentiment where available. Small and CPU-friendly. - ``default``: charlm-based models that additionally include constituency parsing. Larger downloads (English is roughly 300 MB). - ``default_accurate``: the largest, most accurate (electra-based) models, also including constituency parsing.
The Stanza NLP tool records the package alongside each model and loads it with the matching package, so constituency parsing only appears for models installed with ``default`` or ``default_accurate``. A language may be installed with more than one package; each becomes a separate selectable entry in the tool.
Available Languages -------------------
Stanza provides pretrained neural models for 80+ languages. This data manager offers a curated selection of the most commonly used languages. Models are trained on Universal Dependencies v2.12 treebanks.
Usage -----
1. Select one or more languages you want to install (checkboxes) 2. Run the data manager 3. Models will be downloaded and registered in the data table
Model downloads vary in size. Most languages are 50-200MB. Downloading multiple languages will take longer accordingly.
Version -------
This data manager installs models compatible with Stanza version @TOOL_VERSION@.
For more information about Stanza models, see: https://stanfordnlp.github.io/stanza/available_models.html
